footer.tagline: Where the art of healing meets the essence of modern medicine. Healthcare from the heart, recovery from the root.
footer.address: 123 Nam Ky Khoi Nghia Street, District 1, HCMC

home.heroSubtitle: Begin your recovery journey in a serene space where traditional medicine meets modern clinical precision.
home.customerCount: Over 2,000 customers have found balance at Moon Healthcare.
home.philosophyBody: At Moon Healthcare, we believe the human body is a self-balancing ecosystem. Our mission is not just to treat symptoms, but to awaken the body's natural healing ability through a delicate combination of ancient wisdom and rigorous medical standards.
home.mindBodyDesc: Approaching health from the roots of mind and body.
home.personalizedDesc: Each treatment plan is uniquely designed for individual conditions.
home.heritageDesc: Inheriting the finest wisdom from renowned ancient medical manuscripts.
home.clinicalPrecisionDesc: Applying scientific research to verify and optimize treatment effectiveness.
home.clinicalServicesDesc: Advanced therapeutic solutions delivered by our dedicated expert team.
home.featuredProductsDesc: Discover the most trusted herbal and functional health products at Moon Healthcare.
home.ctaTitle: Ready for a more balanced life?
home.ctaBody: Our expert team is always ready to listen and accompany you on the path to holistic health recovery.

services.heroSubtitle: We combine the essence of traditional medicine with modern clinical standards to deliver sustainable and safe health recovery solutions.
services.immediateResultsDesc: Therapies designed to bring relief from the very first session.
services.absoluteSafetyDesc: Strict sterilization procedures and a team of highly experienced clinical doctors.
services.readyTitle: Ready to start your recovery journey?
services.readyBody: Our doctors are always ready to recommend the best treatment plan for your condition.

products.heroSubtitle: Discover our collection of health care products extracted from natural herbs, combined with modern pharmaceutical technology.
products.noProductsBody: Sorry, we couldn't find any products matching your requirements.
products.consultBody: Leave your information so our nutrition expert can help you choose the optimal products.

productDetail.ingredientsCommitment: We commit to using 100% clean ingredients, GACP-WHO certified, with no preservatives or artificial flavors.
productDetail.qualityCertDesc: Products have been rigorously tested at international standard laboratories and licensed by the Ministry of Health.
productDetail.clinicalEfficacyDesc: Formulas developed based on the latest clinical research, optimizing absorption and biological impact on the body.
productDetail.ctaTitle: Start Your Healthy Living Journey with Moon Healthcare
productDetail.ctaBody: Each product is a commitment to quality and dedication to your health.

about.heroBody: Moon Healthcare was born from a passionate dedication to traditional medicine and a desire to bring safe, sustainable health care solutions to the modern community.
about.quote: Health is the harmony between mind and body.
about.coreValuesDesc: The principles that guide us in all our health care activities.
about.dedicationDesc: We listen and understand your every need to deliver the best care experience.
about.qualityDesc: Committed to using clean herbal sources and clinically proven treatment methods.
about.communityDesc: Spreading healthy lifestyles and beneficial medical knowledge to everyone around.
about.clinicalZenBody: "Clinical Zen" is not just a name — it's a standard. We combine the serenity of meditation (Zen) with the precision and transparency of clinical medicine (Clinical).
about.contactDesc: We are always ready to listen and answer all your questions.
about.messagePlaceholder: What issue are you interested in?

booking.title: Book Consultation
booking.chooseServiceDesc: Please select the treatment you are most interested in.
booking.chooseExpertDesc: Our dedicated team of doctors and technicians.
booking.meetingTimeDesc: Choose a date and time that fits your schedule.
booking.contactInfoDesc: We will send confirmation via email and phone number.
booking.thankYou: Thank you for booking! We will contact you as soon as possible.

faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions about Moon Healthcare services and products.
faq.noResults: No questions found matching your keywords.
faq.stillHaveQuestionsDesc: Our support team is always ready to help you 24/7. Don't hesitate to contact us for more detailed answers.

library.heroSubtitle: Discover a curated catalog of therapies selected from herbal essences combined with modern extraction processes, bringing perfect balance to body and mind.
library.pureOriginDesc: Each drop of essence is extracted from organic highland turmeric, fully preserving the precious Curcumin compounds.
library.memberPrivilegesDesc: Subscribe to regular therapy sessions to receive in-depth consultations from our nutrition experts.

practitioners.heroSubtitle: A combination of extensive clinical experience and deep empathy for each patient.
practitioners.bio: Over 15 years of experience in traditional medicine and functional recovery. Previously worked at major hospitals with numerous research projects on natural herbs.
practitioners.joinBody: Moon Healthcare always welcomes colleagues who share our vision of combining traditional and modern medicine.
